name: ExtensionMedicationKnowledge_Cost
title: R5: cost
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `MedicationKnowledge.cost` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`MedicationKnowledge.cost` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `MedicationKnowledge.cost` 0..* `BackboneElement`
*  R4B: `MedicationKnowledge.cost` 0..* `BackboneElement`
*  R4: `MedicationKnowledge.cost` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `MedicationKnowledge.cost` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `MedicationKnowledge.cost` as `Equivalent`.
Creating extension because element `MedicationKnowledge.cost` is a content reference and requires an extesion definition.

element.comment: Element `MedicationKnowledge.cost` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `MedicationKnowledge.cost` as `Equivalent`.

element.short: R5: The date range for which the cost is effective (new)
element.comment:
Element `MedicationKnowledge.cost.effectiveDate` has a context of MedicationKnowledge.cost based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `MedicationKnowledge`.
Element `MedicationKnowledge.cost.effectiveDate` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
element.requirements:
Element `MedicationKnowledge.cost.effectiveDate` has a context of MedicationKnowledge.cost based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `MedicationKnowledge`.
Element `MedicationKnowledge.cost.effectiveDate` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: The date range for which the cost is effective
element.definition: The date range for which the cost information of the medication is effective.

element.comment: Element `MedicationKnowledge.cost.type` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `MedicationKnowledge.cost.type` as `Equivalent`.
element.requirements: Element `MedicationKnowledge.cost.type` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `MedicationKnowledge.cost.type` as `Equivalent`.

element.short: The category of the cost information
element.definition: The category of the cost information.  For example, manufacturers' cost, patient cost, claim reimbursement cost, actual acquisition cost.

element.comment: Element `MedicationKnowledge.cost.source` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `MedicationKnowledge.cost.source` as `Equivalent`.
element.requirements: Element `MedicationKnowledge.cost.source` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `MedicationKnowledge.cost.source` as `Equivalent`.

element.short: The source or owner for the price information
element.definition: The source or owner that assigns the price to the medication.

element.short: R5: The price or category of the cost of the medication additional types
element.definition: R5: `MedicationKnowledge.cost.cost[x]` additional types (CodeableConcept) additional types from child elements (coding, text)
element.comment:
Element `MedicationKnowledge.cost.cost[x]` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `MedicationKnowledge.cost.cost` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `MedicationKnowledge.cost.cost[x]` do not cover the following types: CodeableConcept.
The mappings for `MedicationKnowledge.cost.cost[x]` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: coding, text.
element.requirements:
Element `MedicationKnowledge.cost.cost[x]` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `MedicationKnowledge.cost.cost` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `MedicationKnowledge.cost.cost[x]` do not cover the following types: CodeableConcept.
The mappings for `MedicationKnowledge.cost.cost[x]` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: coding, text.

element.short: The price or category of the cost of the medication
element.definition: The price or representation of the cost (for example, Band A, Band B or $, $$) of the medication.

binding.description: A coded concept defining the category of a medication.
